entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The third most important pulse crop, Cicer arietinum L.

entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms, leading to yield loss in chickpea

entities.description: A specific biotic stress disease affecting chickpea

entities.description: A specific biotic stress disease affecting chickpea

entities.description: Non-living stress factors leading to yield loss in chickpea

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress involving water deficiency

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress involving high temperatures

entities.name: COLD
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress involving low temperatures

entities.name: SOIL NUTRITIONAL STATUS
entities.description: The level of nutrients available in the soil, which can be poor

entities.name: MARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: Lands with limited productivity used for cultivation

entities.name: CROP DURATION
entities.description: The length of time from planting to harvest

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM
entities.description: The underground organ system of the plant, specifically prolific systems for water-limited environments

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by restricted water availability

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome to accelerate breeding

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving plant traits through selective breeding

entities.name: INTRASPECIFIC LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map showing the relative positions of markers within a single species
